zh.Wadden Hall, Waltham, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特沃爾坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Haute於大約1278年出生在英國肯特沃爾坦時，他的父親Sir Symon de Haute29歲，母親Lady Julianne Stapleton29歲。他於大約1290年與Margery Marynes結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1371年在他的家鄉享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Haute于大约1278年出生在英国肯特沃爾坦时，他的父亲Sir Symon de Haute29岁，母亲Lady Julianne Stapleton29岁。他于大约1290年与Margery Marynes结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1371年在他的家乡享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname or status name from an argot word (thieves’ slang) in Bavaria and Austria for a peasant farmer (see   Hotz   1). Compare   Houts   and   Houtz  .

variants.name: Hotz
meanings: South German and Swiss German: from thieves' cant for a peasant or farmer, which in turn derives from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hugizo or Huzo, pet forms of a compound name formed with hug- as the first element (see, for example, Hubert , Hugh ).
South German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German hotzen ‘to run swiftly’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Haute was born about 1278, in Waltham, Kent, England, his father, Sir Symon de Haute, was 29 and his mother, Lady Julianne Stapleton, was 29. He married Margery Marynes about 1290. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1371, in his hometown, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Haute est né environ 1278, à Waltham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Symon de Haute, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Julianne Stapleton, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margery Marynes environ 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1371, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Haute um 1278 in Waltham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Symon de Haute 29 und seine Mutter Lady Julianne Stapleton 29. Er hat um 1290 Margery Marynes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1371 im Alter von 94 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Haute è nato il circa 1278 nel Waltham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Symon de Haute, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Julianne Stapleton, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margery Marynes circa 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1371, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Hauteが約1278年にイギリスケントワルサムで生まれた時，父Sir Symon de Hauteは29歳，母Lady Julianne Stapletonは29歳であった。約1290年にMargery Marynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1371年に故郷で94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Haute(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 켄트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Symon de Haute(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Julianne Stapleton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1290년 Margery Marynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1371년 그의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Haute nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Symon de Haute, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Julianne Stapleton, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Marynes aproximadamente 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1371, em sua cidade natal, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Haute родился около 1278 г. в местности валтам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Symon de Haute было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Julianne Stapleton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Marynes около 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1371 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Haute nació aproximadamente 1278, en Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Symon de Haute, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Julianne Stapleton, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margery Marynes aproximadamente 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1371, en su pueblo, a la edad de 94 años.
